content.content:

I couldn’t find any calendar event titled “Networking event” on 2026-05-26. I searched for that exact title and for “Networking,” and I also checked all events on 2026-05-26 — no matches were found.

What would you like me to try next?

- Search the whole calendar for “Networking” (broader match).  
- Search nearby dates (e.g., 2026-05-25 to 2026-05-27).
